Just a quick tidbit about the 28 Day Belly Fat Blast or Southern Belly Fat Challenge. You can go in and grab these six week sick pack workouts if you so desire from the internal plays that are inside of Legacy from a fulfillment standpoint. I didn't even get a chance to put together the workout but it's one workout a week of abs. I maybe by the time you're watching this, there will be an example that's already in there but I just wanted to, in case you were in the gap time where that didn't exist, you can grab the six week six pack programming there or just make six out workouts. I mean, it shouldn't be too complicated but just wanted to make this little video to make sure that you knew that but otherwise everything should be straightforward, use the marketing plays, the new meal plans just look different, they should be easy and you can probably do it in a large group if you need to. Easy peasy.
